calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Brian Ngo, Esq. for the Plaintiff: American Express Bank, FSB.
Copy of Declaration by Plaintiff's Witness Hsenyee Pai re CCP 98 was presented to the court for review.
No appearance by Defendant Conrada Lopez.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Principal - $16,588.82
Pre-judgment Interest - $3260.99 for a Total of $20,348.81
Judgment was submitted and signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-23-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Dismissal IS Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK
